Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Advocates]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Advocates are self-proclaimed guardians of galactic civilization.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Advocates are individuals who might pursue a criminal.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 1''' — The Advocates are a group that people join through applications.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — The Advocates wear blue and white uniforms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — The Advocates have the authority to arrest individuals for crimes such as abduction, robbery, sabotage, and piracy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — The Advocates do not execute prisoners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The Advocates are dedicated to the protection of the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — The Advocates have a presence near the Scylon system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — The Advocates are a group that performs inspections on ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — The Advocates can distinguish between sloppy paperwork and criminal activity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Advocates sometimes leave a trail of bodies behind them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The narrator has waged war against the Advocates using the Lagomorph Contract.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — Shyrax and Sola carried two Advocates each.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Mell and Starhammer were once working against the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Advocates utilize blue-and-white ships, sometimes trimmed in silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — The narrator's costume was modeled after the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Mell wants the Advocates organization to fall apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — The Advocates have a duel format involving pistols at dawn using stun rounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Mell wants to avoid staying around the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — The Advocates are described as corrupt but having a purpose to save people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — The Advocate fleet consists of a thousand ships in blue and white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — The Advocates are described as ordinary in a previous context.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — The Advocates are a group that may use life-pods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — The Advocates are enemies of some of the narrator's allies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — The Advocates take in foreign ships from across the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — The Advocates rely heavily on Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 31''' — Advocates seal away mysterious relics that defy identification.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Advocates are a group that may not know who went after Doctor Nova.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — The original Advocates were a group of vigilantes in the Free Worlds who gained quasi-official authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Advocates are a group that can be dangerous in large numbers on a battlefield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Mell mentions she will stop messing with the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — The Advocates are an organization.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — The Advocates have a headquarters (Advocate HQ).}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — The Advocates are retreating and gathering forces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — The Advocates are a group that the protagonists may face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — The Advocates have a warrant for the arrest of Jak Escalon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — Omega killed the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — The Advocates are a group that Raion fears might kidnap Javik.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — The Advocates employ Undermaker in disaster relief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Advocates are a group that Omega scared.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — The Advocates were part of a plan that accounted for them but failed to save Leilari.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — The wizard hired by Starhammer was contracted to the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — The Advocates claimed Doctor Nova and Spellbinder robbed transports, opened prisons, and stole billions of standards worth of goods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Omega brought a team of shell-shocked Advocates with him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Mell's decoys can fool Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — The Advocates include Steel Avalanche.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Advocates are loyal to Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — Advocates fought against Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Advocates provide personal testimonies to the Union.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — The Advocates have placed a bounty on the narrator and Mell's heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — The Advocates are a potential group responsible for subspace blockades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The Advocates are still present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — The Advocates is a group currently in a state of instability.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Raion had a conflict with the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Advocates have fallen.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — The Advocates led an allied fleet with Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — The Advocates were slaughtered in their home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — The Advocates possess top-security vaults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — The Advocates would take no action due to the Councilors' disagreement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — The Advocates have a frozen prison.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
